body.title: Ingest 10 programming books into competition schema
body.result: ingest_batch.py created; 80 blocks queued for 10 books; _deposit_to_schema verified (3 test nodes in competition.memories); worker running (93d4b569)
body.intention: I intend that competition.memories contains enough labeled programming-book chunks to train and eval both classifiers.
body.description:
Select 10 programming books from clan.reading_list (book_type='programming', status='pending'), create a competition campaign with target_schema=competition, run them through the reading pipeline. Goal: 500+ labeled memories in competition.memories before holdout split.

**Affected files:** New script `lab/competition/ingest_batch.py`
**Design rules:** none — operational script
**Scope boundary:** Book selection and campaign kick-off only. Reading pipeline does the extraction. Monitor for completion.
**Completion criteria:** competition.memories has 500+ rows with memory_type labels from at least 5 distinct books; competition.memory_embeddings populated via drain loop.
